INTRO.P2: Our team works with passion, expertise and commitment to offer you a premium, fully personalised service. Choosing L'Événement Peter means you can be certain that every detail will be handled to perfection.

ZONE.TITLE: Weddings & Events Across Brittany
ZONE.INTRO: L'Événement Peter serves all of Brittany for weddings, seminars and events. Based in Rennes, our agency covers the entire region: Ille-et-Vilaine, Morbihan, Finistère, Côtes-d'Armor.
ZONE.NOTE_SUFFIX: — we are happy to consider every request.

ITEMS.title: Tailor-made
ITEMS.desc: Every event is unique. We build your project from A to Z according to your wishes, budget and personality.

ITEMS.title: Local Expertise
ITEMS.desc: Rooted in Brittany, we know the best vendors, venues and trends in the region for a perfect wedding or event.

ITEMS.title: Total Peace of Mind
ITEMS.desc: We manage every detail so you can fully enjoy your day without stress or surprises. Your peace of mind is our priority.

ITEMS.title: Premium Quality

HERO.DESC: Wedding planner based in Rennes, L'Événement Peter orchestrates every detail of your wedding with passion and expertise. From the first consultation to the last note, we create the event you have always dreamed of.

INTRO.TITLE: The Art of Planning a Wedding in Brittany
INTRO.P1: Planning a wedding in Brittany requires in-depth knowledge of the region: quality vendors, exceptional venues, trends and the specific logistical subtleties of the area. That is why L'Événement Peter is your indispensable partner.
INTRO.P2: From Rennes, our agency covers all of Brittany — Ille-et-Vilaine, Morbihan, Finistère, Côtes-d'Armor — to organise weddings worthy of your dreams, whether an intimate ceremony or a grand reception.
INTRO.P3: Wedding planner, on-the-day coordinator, or simply an expert consultation: we tailor our involvement to your needs and budget.

ITEMS.title: Full Coordination
ITEMS.desc: From sourcing vendors to coordinating on the wedding day. We orchestrate every moment so you can experience your wedding serenely.

ITEMS.title: Wedding Day Management
ITEMS.desc: Already planned everything? We step in on the day to coordinate vendors, timings and any unexpected situations. Enjoy without worrying about a thing.

ITEMS.title: Partial Support
ITEMS.desc: Targeted assistance: venue search, vendor negotiation, schedule creation… We adapt our involvement to your specific needs.

ITEMS.title: Full-Service Wedding
ITEMS.desc: Entrust us with the entire organisation. We manage every detail from A to Z for an exceptional wedding in Brittany.

INCLUS.TITLE: What We Organise for You
ITEMS: Search and selection of the reception venue in Brittany
Coordination with all vendors (caterer, photographer, DJ, band, florist…)
Creation of the planning schedule and day programme
Organisation of the civil and/or secular ceremony
Management of invitations, seating plan and accommodation
On-the-day coordination: welcome, timing, handling of any issues
Advice on wedding decoration and design

ZONE.TITLE: Weddings in Brittany & Ille-et-Vilaine
ZONE.P1: Our wedding planning agency in Rennes covers all of Brittany for wedding organisation: Rennes, Saint-Malo, Brest, Vannes, Lorient, Quimper, Dinard, Fougères, Vitré and all the châteaux, manor houses and estates across the region.
ZONE.P2: Every wedding in Brittany is unique. Our knowledge of the territory allows us to find the most beautiful venues and the most talented vendors for your most exclusive day.

CTA.TEXT: Contact us for a no-obligation first meeting. We will explore your project together and suggest the most suitable package.

HERO.DESC: From floral creation to full staging, L'Événement Peter transforms your spaces into living works of art. A wedding design that reflects who you are, in Brittany.

INTRO.TITLE: More Than a Décor — A Sensory Experience
INTRO.P1: Wedding decoration is far more than aesthetics: it is the art of creating an atmosphere, an emotion, a memory. At L'Événement Peter, every detail is crafted to elevate your celebration in Brittany.
INTRO.P2: Our designers work on floral decoration, spatial staging, furniture, lighting and all the visual elements that shape the visual identity of your wedding in Rennes or throughout Brittany.
INTRO.P3: Whether you have a precise vision in mind or would like to be guided, we co-create with you the décor that reveals your personality and enchants your guests.

ITEMS.title: Floral Creation
ITEMS.desc: Bridal bouquets, floral arches, centrepieces, buttonholes, compositions for the church or reception hall. Handcrafted work with fresh, seasonal flowers.

ITEMS.title: Staging & Decoration
ITEMS.desc: Full styling of the reception venue: tables, central aisle, photo wall, cocktail space, children's corner. Every space tells a story.

ITEMS.title: Lighting & Ambiance
ITEMS.desc: Fairy lights, candelabras, spotlights, warm lighting… Lighting completely transforms the atmosphere and creates unforgettable photographs.

ITEMS.title: Stationery & Signage
ITEMS.desc: Menu cards, seating plans, place cards, save-the-dates, ceremony booklets… Cohesive stationery that adorns every moment.

ITEMS.title: Moodboard & Art Direction
ITEMS.desc: We define together your colour palette, materials and inspirations to create a coherent and elegant visual thread throughout the day.

ITEMS.title: Setup & Breakdown
ITEMS.desc: On the day, our team installs all the decoration before your arrival and manages the breakdown at the end of the evening. You have nothing to do.

ITEMS.label: Romantic & Timeless
ITEMS.desc: White roses, candles and fine linens for a classic and elegant wedding.

ITEMS.label: Bohemian & Nature
ITEMS.desc: Pampas grass, eucalyptus, macramé and terracotta tones for a free-spirited and warm atmosphere.

ITEMS.label: Minimalist & Luxury
ITEMS.desc: Clean lines, marble, gold and monochrome flowers for a contemporary aesthetic.

ITEMS.label: Rustic & Countryside
ITEMS.desc: Raw wood, wildflowers and string lights for a charming, idyllic wedding.

ITEMS.label: Breton Wedding
ITEMS.desc: Embroidery, slate, linen and wildflowers to celebrate the beauty of Brittany.

ITEMS.label: Fully Bespoke
ITEMS.desc: Your world, your palette, your vision. We create the unique décor that is entirely you.

CTA.TEXT: Share your inspirations, date and venue. We create a personalised moodboard at our first meeting.

HERO.DESC: L'Événement Peter designs and organises your professional events in Brittany. Seminars, team-building, conventions, corporate evenings: memorable experiences that energise your teams.

INTRO.TITLE: Your Corporate Event Agency in Brittany
INTRO.P1: Organising a seminar in Brittany or Rennes means offering your team an exceptional setting and an experience that leaves a lasting mark. L'Événement Peter brings its expertise and local partner network to your professional events.
INTRO.P2: From finding the ideal venue to on-the-day coordination, including catering, activities and logistics, we take full responsibility for your corporate event in Brittany.
INTRO.P3: Brittany offers a unique setting: châteaux, coastal estates, modern conference centres in Rennes, natural spaces… We select the perfect venue for your goals and budget.

ITEMS.title: Residential Seminars
ITEMS.desc: One or more days of full immersion, with accommodation, meals and activities. We manage everything from A to Z.

ITEMS.title: Team-Building
ITEMS.desc: Original and unifying activities to strengthen team cohesion in the heart of Brittany.

ITEMS.title: Conferences & Conventions
ITEMS.desc: Stage design, technical management, attendee welcome and speaker coordination.

ITEMS.title: Corporate Evenings
ITEMS.desc: Galas, year-end dinners, prestige cocktail receptions. Memorable evenings that strengthen your professional bonds.

ITEMS.title: Incentives
ITEMS.desc: Bespoke programmes to reward and motivate your teams with unique experiences in Brittany.

ITEMS.title: General Meetings
ITEMS.desc: Logistical and technical organisation of your AGMs, congresses and plenary meetings in Brittany.

METHODE.TITLE: Rigorous Organisation, from A to Z

ITEMS.title: Defining Objectives
ITEMS.desc: We analyse your challenges, company culture and expectations to propose an event aligned with your strategic goals.

ITEMS.title: Venue Search
ITEMS.desc: Using our network across Brittany, we select the best available venues in Rennes and throughout the region based on your criteria.

ITEMS.title: Programme Design
ITEMS.desc: Creation of a bespoke programme: schedule, activities, catering, transport, accommodation. Every detail is anticipated.

ITEMS.title: On-the-Day Coordination
ITEMS.desc: Our team is present on the day of your event to orchestrate every vendor and allow you to focus fully on your attendees.

CTA.TEXT: Date, number of participants, event type, budget… Share your brief and receive a detailed proposal within 48 hours.

HERO.DESC: An agency built on passion, excellence and a deep knowledge of Brittany. Let's meet.

MAIN.TITLE: An Agency Dedicated to Your Most Precious Events
MAIN.P1: L'Événement Peter is your trusted event partner for planning an unforgettable wedding. Based in Brittany, our agency is entirely dedicated to creating memorable experiences for the couples who choose us for their most exclusive and unique celebration.
MAIN.P2: Our team works with passion: they are experienced and committed to delivering a premium, tailor-made service. Choosing us means you can be certain that your wedding will not only be managed to perfection, but will also give rise to lifelong memories.
MAIN.P3: Beyond weddings, L'Événement Peter also supports businesses with their seminars and corporate events, as well as families organising funerals and ceremonies with dignity and care. Every event, whether joyful or reflective, deserves the same attention and professionalism.
MAIN.P4: Explore our full range of services and let us accompany you in creating a truly unique celebration!

ITEMS.texte: We never compromise on quality. Every vendor, every detail is carefully selected to achieve excellence.
No two events are alike. Every project is unique and deserves unwavering attention and creativity.
We take the time to know you, to understand your deepest wishes and to translate them into reality with care.
Our role is to carry the organisation on your behalf so that you can fully live every moment of your event.

LOCAL.TITLE: Rooted in Brittany, Passionate About Our Region
LOCAL.P1: Brittany is more than a setting for us — it is our home. This passion for our region is reflected in every event we organise: we know the most beautiful venues, the best local artisans and vendors, the picture-perfect spots that will make your wedding an authentically Breton celebration.
LOCAL.P2: Based in Rennes, our agency covers all of Brittany: Ille-et-Vilaine, Morbihan, Finistère and Côtes-d'Armor. From seaside châteaux to country estates, from Rennes conference centres to Breton vineyard estates, we know every exceptional venue in the region.

HERO.DESC: Wedding in Brittany, seminar in Rennes, custom decoration… Share your project. We will respond within 48 hours with a personalised proposal.
